description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-popup

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popup/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Z-index, distance, offset.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Positioning utility — ensure it doesn't break focus order or hide content.
3. **Functionality** — Anchor element. Placement (12 positions). Flip/shift/auto-update. Distance/skidding. Active state. Strategy (absolute/fixed).
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`. Floating UI types if used.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Positioning engine. Arrow positioning. CSS Parts.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All positioning API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Placements. Flip. Shift. Resize.
8. **Storybook** — All placements. With arrow. Scroll container. Resize.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Used by other components. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Floating UI dependency audit.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-popup
